name: Linc Glycer
desc: Presents you a  pen with Fast flowing ink technology that gives you a comfortable elastomeric rubber grip while writing. It also provides you with a long lasting ink to keep your writing in place.

name: Pilot Hi-Tecpoint 05 Pen
desc: The high-performing yet super comfortable Hi-Tecpoint 05 is the tool you need for precise writing. Its unique 3 dimple tip technology from Japan glides smoothly on paper. The patented 0.5mm Japanese tip delivers a fine line width of 0.3mm.

name: Linc Glycer 10x
desc: 0.7 mm tungsten carbide tip with advanced tip tech, also provides hybrid ink technology.

name: Pilot Hi-Tecpoint V5 Pen
desc: This liquid ink rollerball pen is a best seller. Launched in 1984, its precise finish is delightful. The vibrant ink will ensure a long-lasting and fade-resistant writing experience.

name: Linc Ocean Gel
desc: This pen comes with a comfortable textured grip with opti hold tip technology for smooth writing experience. It also has new velvet ink technology.

name: Luxor
desc: Special antimicrobial material used for pen body which removes 99.99% of bacteria.Tested at certified lab as per JIS Z 2801 standard/protocol for safe, smooth & worry free writing.
